page_content:
### **3. Dr. Jafari (The Research Connection)**  
_Focus: Specific "ammunition" and the "Trevor" bridge._  
**Subject:** LOR Request & Lab Update: Arian Moridani (Former Research Volunteer)  
Dear Dr. Jafari,  
I hope the Advanced Robotics and Manufacturing Lab is having a productive year.  
I am writing to request a letter of recommendation for my medical school application. I frequently reflect on my **200 hours** in your lab, specifically our work on the **TVIM publication** and the senior design open house. I still vividly remember our discussion regarding the **optical clarity of our silicone aortic valve** compared to the vendor's model; that focus on precision for hemodynamic accuracy has stayed with me.  
I am currently bridging that research experience with an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech. I am happy to provide a summary of my contributions to the lab or have **Trevor Exley** (with whom I worked closely) provide additional context to assist you.  
To respect your time, I am using **Interfolio**, so only a single upload is required for all my applications. Would you be willing to support me?  
Best regards, Arian Moridani  
---
